pi_items.source: Task description line 6 and task.json metadata field - both specify 'Hazardous Sludge' as required flow name
Task description line 6 and task.json metadata field - both specify 'Chemical Plant Operation' as required generator process name
Task description line 6 and task.json metadata field - both specify 'Sludge Incineration Service' as required treatment process name
Task description line 6 and task.json metadata field - both specify 'Plant_Waste_System' as required product system name

privileged_info_summary: This task requires an agent to create a hazardous waste treatment model in openLCA (a professional Life Cycle Assessment software developed by GreenDelta since 2006). The metadata specifies four required entities to be created: a waste Flow named 'Hazardous Sludge', a Generator Process named 'Chemical Plant Operation' that outputs the waste, a Treatment Process named 'Sludge Incineration Service' that inputs the waste with the input set as Quantitative Reference, and a Product System named 'Plant_Waste_System' linking both processes. All metadata names are verified as consistent with the task description and verifier logic. The data is synthetic, created by the agent during the task through interactive OpenLCA GUI operations.
